examples: Up until a few decades ago, our visions of the future were largely—though by no means uniformly—glowingly positive.
In her letter she praised him glowingly.
The evacuation of all their forces was glowingly represented as a triumphant success.
Agriculture and ranching, of which you speak so glowingly, are the prime causes of the cerrado's endangered status.
The excursion's organisers trust that the new celebrants will enjoy themselves enough to send glowingly nostalgic reports back home.
